name: openai-image
description: Generate OpenAI-compatible images through stdio or Streamable HTTP MCP transports.

interface.shortDescription: Generate images through stdio or Streamable HTTP MCP.
interface.longDescription: OpenAI Image provides image generation through stdio or Streamable HTTP MCP transports, with prompt styles, batch jobs, dry-run planning, and OpenAI-compatible providers.
defaultPrompt: Generate a polished product mockup image from this prompt.
Run an image generation request through the MCP server.
